# GnG Design Consultants

> Aviation engineering consultancy in West Chester, PA, providing R&D, product design, certification, and FAA/EASA regulatory services.

GnG Design Consultants (GnG Design LLC) is led by founder David Gambill, a senior aerospace engineering executive with 30+ years of experience across rotorcraft, tiltrotor, eVTOL, and fixed-wing programs. The firm advises aviation startups and established manufacturers on systems integration, digital engineering workflows, and certification planning.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, expertise, and how to contact GnG Design.
- [Founder](/founder): David Gambill's bio, professional experience, education, and patents.
